// reporters: StaticNestedStaticOk.java.txt#Outer.reportStatic
package com.consumer.staticnest;

// Legal implicit reference: a STATIC nested type can reach a STATIC method of
// the enclosing type through implicit this - must stay clean, not regress.
class Outer {
    static void reportStatic(Throwable cause) {}

    static class Nested {
        void m() {
            try {
                risky();
            } catch (Exception e) {
                reportStatic(e);
            }
        }

        void risky() throws Exception {}
    }
}
